channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PRIMEFRESH] Ameesha Karia Acquires 2.04% Stake in Prime Fresh Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Ameesha Karia has acquired 2.04% stake in Prime Fresh Ltd. The acquisition was made via the open market. The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition stands at Rs. 14,60,57,670 divided into 1,46,05,767 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 Each.

  • Ameesha Karia acquires 2.04% stake in Prime Fresh Ltd
  • The acquisition was made via the open market
  • The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition stands at Rs. 14,60,57,670 divided into 1,46,05,767 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 Each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prime Fresh Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [FLUOROCHEM] Gujarat Fluorochemicals Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure
item.description:
Gujarat Fluorochemicals Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the Securities of the Company. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026. This decision is pursuant to the PIT Regulations and the Company’s Code of Conduct. The trading restriction will be implemented by freezing the PAN at security level during the Trading Restriction Period. The announcement has been made to all the Directors, officers and designated employees of the Company.

  • Trading window closure announced by Gujarat Fluorochemicals Ltd
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Decision pursuant to PIT Regulations and the Company’s Code of Conduct
  • Trading restriction to be implemented by freezing PAN at security level
  • Announcement made to all Directors, officers and designated employees of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [VGUARD] V-Guard Industries Receives Assessment Order from Income-tax Department
item.description:
V-Guard Industries Ltd. has received an Assessment Order from the Assessment Unit, National Faceless Assessment Centre, Income-tax Department. The order, issued under section 143(3) r.w.s 144B of the Income-tax Act, 1961, assesses the taxable income of the Company for the Assessment Year 2023-24, adding the closing balance of provision for warranty amounting to INR 35,14,75,000. This results in an income-tax demand of INR 10,20,67,830, including applicable interest. The Company believes it has strong grounds to challenge the order and is in the process of filing an appeal before the Commissioner of Income-tax (Appeals). It is also evaluating to file a rectification application against the Assessment Order.

  • V-Guard Industries Ltd. has received an Assessment Order from the Income-tax Department.
  • The order adds the closing balance of provision for warranty amounting to INR 35,14,75,000 to the taxable income.
  • This results in an income-tax demand of INR 10,20,67,830, including applicable interest.
  • The Company believes it has strong grounds to challenge the order and is in the process of filing an appeal.
  • The Company is also evaluating to file a rectification application against the Assessment Order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V-GUARD INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SHREECEM] Shree Cement Ltd. to Announce Q4 and FY 2025-26 Financial Results on 6th May, 2026; Trading Window Closed
item.description:
Shree Cement Ltd. will hold a Board Meeting on 6th May, 2026 to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the Quarter and Year ending on 31st March, 2026. The company may also consider recommending the Final dividend for the Financial year 2025-26. In accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, the Trading Window for dealing in the Securities of the Company will be closed from 1st April, 2026 and shall remain closed till 48 hours after the announcement of financial results i.e. up to 8th May, 2026.

  • Shree Cement Ltd. to announce Q4 and FY 2025-26 financial results on 6th May, 2026
  • Company to consider approving audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the Quarter and Year ending on 31st March, 2026
  • Shree Cement may recommend Final dividend for the Financial year 2025-26
  • Trading Window closed from 1st April, 2026 to 48 hours after the financial results announcement i.e. up to 8th May, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREE CEMENT LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MANGALAM] Mangalam Drugs & Organics Ltd: Key Managerial Personnel Changes in Board Meeting
item.description:
Mangalam Drugs & Organics Ltd has informed BSE about a Board Meeting scheduled on 26th March 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the resignation of Ms. Anuradha Pandey as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, and the appointment of Ms. Shweta Patel as her successor in the same role.

  • Mangalam Drugs & Organics Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on 26th March 2026
  • The meeting will consider the resignation of Ms. Anuradha Pandey as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
  • Ms. Shweta Patel is appointed as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, effective 1st April 2026
  • The changes are in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANGALAM DRUGS & ORGANICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VOLTAS] Voltas Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure Until After FY2026 Results
item.description:
Voltas Ltd, a Tata Group company, has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure will begin on Wednesday, 25th March, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the audited financial results for the year ending on 31st March, 2026 are declared to the Stock Exchanges. This move is in accordance with the Tata Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading adopted by the company.

  • Voltas Ltd announces closure of trading window from 25th March, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after FY2026 results declaration
  • Move aligns with Tata Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VOLTAS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PRIMO] Primo Chemicals Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window till 48 hours after Q4 and Year Ended 31 March, 2026 Results
item.description:
Primo Chemicals Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in equity shares from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended 31 March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider and approve these results will be intimated in due course. The Central Depository Services (India) Limited is the Designated Depository of the Company for restricting trading by Designated Persons (DPs) and their immediate relatives by freezing PAN at security level for Company's ISIN- INE607A01022 in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/55 dated 21April, 2025.

  • Trading window for Primo Chemicals Ltd. to remain closed from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after Q4 and Year Ended 31 March, 2026 results
  • The date of the Board Meeting to consider and approve these results will be intimated in due course
  • Central Depository Services (India) Limited is the Designated Depository of the Company for restricting trading by Designated Persons (DPs) and their immediate relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Primo Chemicals Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LATIMMETAL] Rahul Timbadia Acquires 12,824 Shares of La Tim Metal & Industries Ltd on March 24, 2026
item.description:
Rahul Timbadia has acquired 12,824 equity shares of La Tim Metal & Industries Limited on March 24, 2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) & 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The shares were acquired on the open market. Before the acquisition, Rahul Timbadia held 8.86% of the total share/voting capital of the company. After the acquisition, his holding increased to 8.86% of the total share/voting capital.

  • Rahul Timbadia acquired 12,824 equity shares of La Tim Metal & Industries Limited on March 24, 2026.
  • The acquisition was made on the open market.
  • Before the acquisition, Rahul Timbadia held 8.86% of the total share/voting capital of the company.
  • After the acquisition, Rahul Timbadia's holding increased to 8.86% of the total share/voting capital.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: La Tim Metal & Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SOLARIUM] Solarium Green Energy Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Insiders
item.description:
Solarium Green Energy Ltd, in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 and the company’s Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities, has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company by the Insiders. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, and will continue for 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Financial Results for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026, will be intimated in due course. All Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period of trading window closure.

  • Solarium Green Energy Ltd announces trading window closure for insiders.
  • The closure is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 and the company’s Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities.
  • The trading window will be closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Financial Results for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026, will be intimated in due course.
  • Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period of trading window closure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solarium Green Energy Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IGIL] Trading Window Closure Notice by International Gemmological Institute India Ltd for Q4 & FY Ending March 31, 2026
item.description:
International Gemmological Institute India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The company has informed its Designated Persons about the closure. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results will be announced later. The information is also available on the company's website.

  • Trading window closure from April 1, 2026
  • Reopening 48 hours after Q4 & FY results declaration
  • Closure under Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Company informed Designated Persons
  • Board Meeting date to be announced later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: International Gemmological Institute India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
